groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #4.

sentences.text: The hydraulic turret drive enables the tank to slew its main gun three hundred sixty degrees in under nine seconds.

The hydraulic turret drive enables the tank to slew its main gun three hundred sixty degrees in under nine seconds. The photographer captured a striking image of a lone tank silhouetted against the orange desert sunset.

Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen.
